scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop: echo Open http://localhost:5173 after running npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=scanner && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run prisma:generate --workspace=backend
